name: Hawaiian Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat electric oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer, cream shortening and sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg and vanilla; beat well.
4. Sift flour with baking powder, baking soda, and salt; gradually mix into creamed mixture.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients.
6. Shape dough into 1-1/2 inch balls.
7. Place on ungreased baking sheets and flatten with the bottom of a glass dipped in flour.
8. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Makes 3 dozen large cookies.
